title: Dream On
why_this_song: Dream On by Aerosmith (1973) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 20 times; first heard in: "Sing with me, sing for a year"
Appears 17 times; first heard in: "Dream on"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "I know it's everybody's sin"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "Yeah, I know nobody knows"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "Sing with me, sing for a year"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Dream until your dream come true
Sing with me, sing for the year
Sing for the laughter and sing for the tear
Sing it with me, if it's just for today
Maybe tomorrow, the good Lord will take you away

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "sing" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "sing" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "dream" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "dream" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Every time when I look in the mirror
All the things come back to you

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: All these lines on my face getting clearer
Live and learn from fools and from sages
Dream until your dream come true

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: "Dream On" was released in 1973. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "Dream On" foi lançada em 1973. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "Dream On" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "Dream On" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
